title: Implement per-gun state storage in GunData.state Map with NBT persistence

reference_files.reason: Three-tier ownership - per-gun storage carrier (GunData.state Data Component), persistence with NBT
GunData Component structure - state field (Map<ResourceLocation, Object>), NBT persistence
Persistence table - per-gun persists with GunData NBT, survives relogin/cross-server/drop

acceptance_criteria: GunData.state field (Map<ResourceLocation, Object>) uses StateValueCodecs dispatch Codec for serialization
State map Codec correctly serializes/deserializes mixed value types per key (int, double, boolean, etc.)
State map defaults to empty map when no states written
State map persists with item NBT (drop, chest, relogin all preserve state values)
GunData.setState(ResourceLocation id, Object value) helper method creates new immutable GunData with updated state map
GunData.getState(ResourceLocation id) helper method returns value or null
GunData.clearState(ResourceLocation id) helper method creates new immutable GunData with key removed
All GunData operations maintain immutability (return new records, don't mutate)
deliverables: src/main/java/org/yanbwe/modularshoot/component/GunData.java (updated: state Codec using StateValueCodecs dispatch, helper methods)
